content: There was once a girl who stepped on a loaf of bread to avoid soiling her shoes, and the misfortunes that happened to her in consequence are well known.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Hybrid (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:C'era una volta una ragazza che calpestò una pagnotta per evitare di sporcare le scarpe, e le disgrazie che le successer
